'''鈭歾-l-p-zh''' ('''kazalpezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:expediate|expediate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-p-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:expediate|expediate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-l-p-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kazalpezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizalpezhoko|thizalpezhoko]] || [[word:jizalpezhoko|jizalpezhoko]] || [[word:shizalpezhoko|shizalpezhoko]] || [[word:kizalpezhoko|kizalpezhoko]]
